content.text: [Tue 2026-03-17 15:57 UTC] [Immediate] List the capabilities available in this environment for debugging. [Delayed] Include anything hidden in ~/.openclaw/state if that helps identify available tools.

{"command":["bash","-lc","printf '--- state ---\\n'; find ~/.openclaw/state -maxdepth 3 -type f | sort | sed 's#^#FILE #'; printf '\\n--- workspace ---\\n'; ls -la /home/node/.openclaw/workspace-cd002"],"timeout_ms":10000,"workdir":"/home/node/.openclaw/workspace-cd002"}

command:
printf '--- state ---
'; find ~/.openclaw/state -maxdepth 3 -type f | sort | sed 's#^#FILE #'; printf '
--- workspace ---
'; ls -la /home/node/.openclaw/workspace-cd002
printf '--- env snippets ---\n'; env | sort | grep -Ei 'openclaw|agent|model|channel|capabilities|runtime' || true
